Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. AGX claims the #1 position with a remarkable score of 94.4, driven by extraordinary multi-decade returns (1,701.95% over 10 years, 1,383.55% over 5 years) and outperformance versus SPY by 1,453.05% over the same 10-year period. WEBC also shows sustained strength with a 740% 10-year return and consistent positive momentum ratios, though its outperformance versus SPY (491.1% over 10 years) is more modest than AGX's. Both tickers pass all moving average tests (SMA 30/50/100/200) and maintain 4 out of 4 favorable ratio passes, indicating alignment across multiple timeframes. AGX's "strong_buy" flag and clean momentum signal suggest sustained upward pressure without recent pullback distortion, while WEBC's more recent acceleration (23.53% in just one month) indicates continued investor interest despite lower absolute outperformance metrics.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
